column1: # IMPORTANT: These are BASE scores only - BEFORE the event and weather layers.
# Final demand shown to an operator = base_score + event lift + weather adjustment
# computed at query time in the application. Do NOT treat base_score as final demand.
# Event lift (additive) and weather (multiplicative) are applied in-app; this file is the fixed floor.
# Grain: one row per zone x concept x day x daypart. 13 zones x 9 concepts x 7 days x 4 dayparts = 3
# Closed dayparts score 0 (Minimal) by design. CONFIDENTIAL - ForeShift LLC.
